name: Daily standup digest
task_prompt: Summarize yesterday's activity across active projects into a short standup digest: what moved, what's blocked, and what's due today.

name: Weekly incident review
task_prompt: Compile this week's incidents and postmortems from the knowledge base into a review summary with action items.

name: Monday content ideas
task_prompt: Research trending topics in product analytics and propose 3 blog post ideas in the Greenhouse brand voice.
